name: Rolando Dy
bio: Filipino combat sports athlete who made his UFC debut in 2017 and went 1-3 in the promotion before release. Captured the Abu Dhabi Warriors featherweight title in 2019 and competed in Brave Combat Federation through 2022. Transitioned to bare-knuckle boxing and became the first BKB world champion from the Philippines, defeating Liam Rees for the BKB World Super Welterweight Championship in December 2025.
